---
title: "R for Marine Science Workshop 2"
author: "Miroslava Guerrero"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: 
 html_document:
    code_folding: show
    collapse: no
    df_print: paged
    fig_caption: yes
    fig_height: 6
    fig_width: 10
    highlight: textmate
    theme: spacelab
    toc: yes
    toc_float: yes
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---
# Workshop 2 - Advanced data wrangling: Extracting ecological signals from noisy systems


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Set options, housekeeping
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	include = TRUE,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE)
```

## Load packages and housekeeping
```{r packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
rm(list=ls()) # clear out environment

library(tidyverse)
```
